description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a symmetrical front facade, featuring a double garage on the left and a central entryway with a small porch. The exterior walls are primarily white with beige trim, and the roof is a dark gray gable style with dormer windows on the upper level. The front yard is landscaped with green grass, bushes, and two round shrubs near the walkway. On the right side, there is a fenced backyard area with a wooden play structure and a hot tub, partially shaded by large trees. The rear of the house includes a covered patio with outdoor furniture, and multiple large windows provide ample natural light. The overall design is reminiscent of modern Colonial or American suburban homes, with clean lines and practical outdoor amenities.
description: A two-story white suburban house with a double garage, dark gray gable roof, landscaped yard, and backyard amenities including a play structure and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, central entryway with porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with two round shrubs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage driveway, side windows, and backyard with a wooden play structure and large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio with outdoor furniture, large windows, and backyard trees providing shade.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway, hot tub, and the side profile of the house with additional landscaping and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a small porch, single front door, steps, and flanking shrubs
